sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_clamp (value Float64, min Float64, max Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_clamp (value, min, max) VALUES (1, 2, 3);
SELECT clamp(value, min, max) AS clamped_value FROM test_clamp;
UPDATE test_clamp SET value = clamp(value, min, max) WHERE value < min;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_clamp WHERE clamp(value, min, max) = max;
